{
  "name": "flux",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Umbrella app: Workouts, Meditate, Check-in",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "typecheck": "tsc -b --noEmit",
    "test": "playwright test",
    "validate-catalog": "tsx scripts/validate-catalog.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@capacitor/android": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/app": "^6.0.2",
    "@capacitor/core": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/haptics": "^6.0.2",
    "preact": "^10.25.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@capacitor/cli": "^6.2.0",
    "@playwright/test": "1.57.0",
    "@preact/preset-vite": "^2.10.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "postcss": "^8.4.49",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.17",
    "tsx": "^4.22.1",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

git add src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx tests/workouts.spec.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
workouts: hide notes textarea until exercise is marked done

Mirrors the existing behavior of the difficulty toggle: notes only
appear after the user taps Mark Done, keeping the pre-completion view
focused on weight + done. Saved notes still display when the exercise
is re-marked completed.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --reviewer patflynn --title "workouts: hide notes textarea until exercise is marked done" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Moves the per-exercise notes `<textarea>` inside the `{completed && ...}` fragment in `ExerciseCard.tsx` so it now renders alongside the difficulty buttons rather than always-on.
- Order inside the completed block is: difficulty grid → failed-detail (conditional) → notes textarea.
- Saved notes still surface when the exercise is re-marked completed (`value={notes}` wiring unchanged); `setNotes`, `toggleDone`, and state shape are untouched.

## UX
- Before Mark Done: only the done button shows below the weight controls.
- After Mark Done: difficulty buttons + notes textarea appear.
- Toggling done off hides both again.

## Test plan
- [x] `npm run build` (tsc + vite) passes
- [x] `npm test` (Playwright) — all 15 tests green
- [x] Extended `tests/workouts.spec.ts` "difficulty toggles hidden until Done is tapped" to also assert the notes textarea follows the same show/hide lifecycle

Run: 20260521-0656-3aba4c1a
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -10

content.content: https://github.com/gunk-dev/flux/pull/82

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/gunk-dev/flux/pull/82

Summary of the change:
- `src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx:259` — moved the notes `<textarea>` inside the existing `{completed && (...)}` fragment, placed after the failed-detail block, so it follows the same show/hide lifecycle as the difficulty grid.
- `tests/workouts.spec.ts:61` — extended the existing "hidden until Done is tapped" e2e test to also assert `notes-0` is absent before Mark Done, visible after, and gone again after toggling off.
- `npm run build` and `npm test` (all 15 Playwright tests) pass; `klaus _pre-review` clean.

result:
PR created: https://github.com/gunk-dev/flux/pull/82

Summary of the change:
- `src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx:259` — moved the notes `<textarea>` inside the existing `{completed && (...)}` fragment, placed after the failed-detail block, so it follows the same show/hide lifecycle as the difficulty grid.
- `tests/workouts.spec.ts:61` — extended the existing "hidden until Done is tapped" e2e test to also assert `notes-0` is absent before Mark Done, visible after, and gone again after toggling off.
- `npm run build` and `npm test` (all 15 Playwright tests) pass; `klaus _pre-review` clean.
